title: 12 Pcs Artificial Flowers, Blue Artificial Gypsophila, Baby Breath Flowers Artificial, Gypsophila Artificial Flowers Fake Flowers Decorative for Wedding Bouquet Party Decorations
features: 【Quantity】A bouquet of babys breath artificial flowers, Pack of 12 PCS artificial baby's breath stems. Baby breath flowers artificial gypsophila 3 forks per bush, There are about 30 little buds on each bouquet. The sturdy stem with luxuriant foliage, suitable for most vases

【Easy to Diy】Our gypsophila flowers have flexible stem, flower head and branch can be uninstalled and install. It can also tie gypsophila together with other artificial roses to make the flowers arrangement for home decoraiton
【Perfect for Decor】Our blue flowers artificial are perfect as decorative artificial flowers for weddings, parties, baby showers, or table centerpieces, creating a soft and romantic atmosphere
【Easy Maintenance and No Fading】These decorative artificial flowers require no watering or sunlight, and the vibrant color stays beautiful over time with no fading

【Note】The main picture is the effect for 24-36pcs, if you want the same effect, please order more. If the gypsophila artificial flowers bulk you received, the flower head will fall off due to transportation,which is a normal phenomenon. you can install it again. If you feel that the flower head has fallen off seriously, please contact us by email
